name: Browser Visual QA and Workspace Rendering Certification

routes.nonblankMethod: graph SVG dimensions, visible SVG marks, and non-empty plotted path
graph SVG dimensions, visible SVG marks, and non-empty plotted path before and after adding x^2
routes.interactionTested: add valid expression and add invalid expression without blanking route
limitations: Invalid graph expressions are certified as safe/no-crash, not yet as a dedicated user-facing validation message.

routes.nonblankMethod: geometry board SVG dimensions and visible grid/object marks
routes.interactionTested: select Point tool, create a point, drag on the board
limitations: Point drag is smoke-level interaction; it does not yet assert exact coordinate deltas or dependent-measurement recomputation in browser.

routes.nonblankMethod: 3D surface dimensions, canvas dimensions, and canvas PNG data URL evidence
limitations: Pixel histogram comparison is not yet implemented; Phase 3 uses canvas data evidence and visible DOM controls.

routes.nonblankMethod: data surface dimensions and visible spreadsheet/function-analysis navigation cards
limitations: Spreadsheet cell editing is left to existing kernel/unit tests and future browser workflow expansion.

routes.nonblankMethod: teacher surface dimensions and visible guided/presentation panels
limitations: Export/download side effects are not asserted in this smoke suite.

knownLimitations: No screenshot-baseline visual regression is claimed.
3D certification uses canvas size and data URL evidence, not full pixel histogram analysis.
Unsupported action helper is still not wired through every workspace command path.
MathWorkspace.tsx remains large and route-shell splitting is still a Phase 4 architecture risk.
